## Product Value

- What hotel work/fear loop does this improve?
- Why does this make the first Steam screenshot or trailer segment stronger?

## Scope

- Files/assets changed:
- Binary Unreal assets touched:
- Non-goals:

## Required Checks

- [ ] No Fourfold/Unity-era design assumptions introduced.
- [ ] No open-world, online-required, live-service, co-op, account, or server dependency introduced.
- [ ] Work is proven in hotel production context or explicitly labeled as a test harness.
- [ ] Visual/camera/audio/UI/level/performance impact considered.
- [ ] Placeholder impact recorded in `Ledgers/PLACEHOLDER_LEDGER.md`.
- [ ] Asset/license impact recorded in `Ledgers/ASSET_LICENSE_LEDGER.md`.
- [ ] No secrets, paid raw assets, unclear-license assets, or private sales strategy committed.
- [ ] No paid service, paid asset, or unsafe external dependency added without explicit approval.

## Evidence

- Screenshot/video/log/profile path:
- Performance note:
- Remaining placeholders:
- License notes:
